    A

    addBatch() - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxInsert
    Adds the currently-bound row to the batch.

    Returns the value of the aggregateId record component.
    aggregateId(String) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
    Sets the aggregate identifier (non-blank).
    aggregateType() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent
    Returns the value of the aggregateType record component.
    aggregateType(String) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
    Sets the aggregate type (non-blank).
    Anti-patterns - Section in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.ConnectionSupplier
     
    applyPublisherSchema(Connection) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck.OutboxDialectContractTest
    Applies the publisher DDL (the outbox table the dialect writes into) on the supplied Connection.
    Autoconfig ordering - Section in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxAutoConfiguration
     

    B

    BATCH_INSERT - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.DialectCapability
    The dialect's JDBC driver supports addBatch / executeBatch.
    bind(OutboxEvent, UUID) - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxInsert
    Binds the event to the statement using the dialect's chosen parameter order.
    build() - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox.Builder
    Builds the JdbcOutbox instance.
    build() - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
    Builds the OutboxEvent and applies defaults for unset optional fields.
    builder() - Static method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox
    Creates a fresh JdbcOutbox.Builder.
    builder() - Static method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent
    Creates a fresh OutboxEvent.Builder.

    clock(Clock) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox.Builder
    Sets the Clock used by the default id generator.
    close() - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxInsert
    Releases the underlying PreparedStatement.
    connectionSupplier(ConnectionSupplier) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox.Builder
    Sets the ConnectionSupplier that provides the JDBC connection used by every publish.
    ConnectionSupplier - Interface in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc
    Provides the JDBC Connection that should participate in the caller's transaction.

    Returns the value of the contentType record component.

    Sets the content type (non-blank; e.g.

    DEFAULT_TAG_FALLBACK - Static variable in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer.MeteredOutbox
    Default replacement for tag values that fail the cardinality predicate.

    Returns the value of the destination record component.

    Sets the optional destination (topic / exchange / queue) as a transport-agnostic logical name, e.g.

    The dialect under test.

    Pins a specific OutboxDialect, bypassing auto-detection.

    Optional database features an OutboxDialect may declare.

    Executes the accumulated batch and returns the per-row update counts.

    Generates a fresh identifier, optionally honoring clock for timestamp-based UUID variants.

    Returns the Connection bound to the caller's current transaction.

    Adds (or overrides) a single header pair.

    Returns the headers map.
    headers(Map) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
    Replaces all previously accumulated headers with a copy of newHeaders.

    I

    id() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent
    Returns the value of the id record component.
    id(UUID) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
    Sets the event identifier.
    idGenerator(IdGenerator) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox.Builder
    Sets the IdGenerator used to assign UUIDs to events that don't carry one.
    IdGenerator - Interface in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc
    Produces the UUID written to the id column when the caller did not set one on the OutboxEvent.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox - package io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
     
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.core - module io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.core
    Public API of the outbox-publisher library: the Outbox interface, the OutboxEvent record, and the OutboxException type.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc - module io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc
    JDBC-backed implementation of Outbox.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc - package io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc
     
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi - package io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi
     
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer - module io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer
    Optional Micrometer instrumentation for Outbox.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer - package io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer
     
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel - module io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel
    Optional OpenTelemetry tracing for Outbox.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel - package io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel

    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck - module io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck
    Technology Compatibility Kit (TCK) for OutboxDialect implementations.
    io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck - package io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck
     

    J

    JdbcOutbox - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc
    JDBC implementation of Outbox.
    JdbcOutbox.Builder - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc
    Fluent builder for JdbcOutbox.
    JdbcOutboxBuilderCustomizer - Interface in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Callback for advanced customization of the auto-configured JdbcOutbox bean.

    M

    MeteredOutbox - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer
    Decorator that adds Micrometer instrumentation to every publish and publishAll call without changing the contract of the underlying Outbox.
    MeteredOutbox(Outbox, MeterRegistry) - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer.MeteredOutbox
    Creates a new metering decorator around delegate with the default pass-through tag policy.
    MeteredOutbox(Outbox, MeterRegistry, BiPredicate, String) - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer.MeteredOutbox
    Creates a new metering decorator around delegate with a custom tag-cardinality policy.
    metrics() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties
    Returns the value of the metrics record component.
    Metrics(boolean, String, List) - Constructor for record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties.Metrics
    Creates an instance of a Metrics record class.

    N

    NATIVE_JSON - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.DialectCapability
    The dialect has a native JSON column type for headers (e.g.
    NATIVE_UUID - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.DialectCapability
    The dialect natively binds UUID via setObject.

    O

    occurredAt() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent
    Returns the value of the occurredAt record component.
    occurredAt(Instant) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
    Sets the domain timestamp.
    outbox(DataSource, OutboxProperties, ObjectProvider) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxAutoConfiguration
    Creates the default Outbox bean (a JdbcOutbox) wired to the single DataSource in the context, with optional JdbcOutboxBuilderCustomizer hooks applied before JdbcOutbox.Builder.build().
    Outbox - Interface in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Writes domain events to the outbox table inside the caller's database transaction.
    OutboxAutoConfiguration - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Auto-configures an Outbox bean backed by JdbcOutbox.
    OutboxAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxAutoConfiguration
     
    OutboxConfigurationException - Exception Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Signals that the outbox cannot operate because the deployment is misconfigured: the outbox table is missing, columns do not match the expected schema, the JDBC driver is not on the classpath, or the configured DataSource cannot be opened at all.
    OutboxConfigurationException(String) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxConfigurationException
    Creates a new OutboxConfigurationException with the given message.
    OutboxConfigurationException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxConfigurationException
    Creates a new OutboxConfigurationException with the given message and cause.
    OutboxDataException - Exception Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Signals that the event itself is malformed for the underlying store: a column value out of range, a string that exceeds the declared length, an invalid JSON document for the headers column, or a numeric overflow.
    OutboxDataException(String) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxDataException
    Creates a new OutboxDataException with the given message.
    OutboxDataException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxDataException
    Creates a new OutboxDataException with the given message and cause.
    OutboxDialect - Interface in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi
    Dialect SPI for outbox-jdbc.
    OutboxDialectContractTest - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck
    Abstract JUnit 5 contract test base for OutboxDialect implementations.
    OutboxDialectContractTest() - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.tck.OutboxDialectContractTest
    Subclass-only constructor; JUnit instantiates the concrete subclass per test method.
    OutboxDialectProvider - Interface in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi
    Service-loaded factory for OutboxDialect.
    OutboxEvent - Record Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    One row to be written to the outbox table.
    OutboxEvent(UUID, String, String, String, String, byte[], Map, String, Instant) - Constructor for record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent
    Canonical compact constructor: validates every component (non-null, non-blank) and makes a defensive copy of payload and headers so the resulting record is effectively immutable.
    OutboxEvent.Builder - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Fluent builder for OutboxEvent.
    OutboxException - Exception Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Thrown when the outbox store rejects a write that the caller had no way to prevent — typically an underlying SQL error, a connectivity failure, or a schema mismatch.
    OutboxException(String) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxException
    Creates a new OutboxException with the given message.
    OutboxException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxException
    Creates a new OutboxException with the given message and cause.
    OutboxHealthIndicator - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Spring Boot Actuator AbstractHealthIndicator that probes the outbox table.
    OutboxHealthIndicator(DataSource, String, String) - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxHealthIndicator
    Creates a new health indicator.
    OutboxInsert - Interface in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi
    Per-batch insert handle returned by OutboxDialect.prepareInsert(Connection, TableRef).
    OutboxIntegrityException - Exception Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Signals an integrity-constraint violation: most commonly a duplicate primary key, meaning an event with the same id has already been written to the outbox.
    OutboxIntegrityException(String) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxIntegrityException
    Creates a new OutboxIntegrityException with the given message.
    OutboxIntegrityException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxIntegrityException
    Creates a new OutboxIntegrityException with the given message and cause.
    outboxOpenTelemetrySdk(Environment, OutboxProperties) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxOpenTelemetrySdkAutoConfiguration
    Builds an
    invalid reference 
    OpenTelemetrySdk
    via AutoConfiguredOpenTelemetrySdk, seeded with every otel.* property visible to Spring's Environment.
    OutboxOpenTelemetrySdkAutoConfiguration - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Bridges Spring's Environment into AutoConfiguredOpenTelemetrySdk so otel.* keys placed in application.yml (or any other PropertySource) are honored by the SDK.
    OutboxOpenTelemetrySdkAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxOpenTelemetrySdkAutoConfiguration
     
    OutboxProperties - Record Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Configuration for OutboxAutoConfiguration.
    OutboxProperties(boolean, String, String, OutboxProperties.Metrics, OutboxProperties.Tracing, OutboxProperties.Health) - Constructor for record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties
    Creates an instance of a OutboxProperties record class.
    OutboxProperties.Health - Record Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Health indicator settings.
    OutboxProperties.Metrics - Record Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Metrics decorator settings.
    OutboxProperties.Tracing - Record Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Tracing decorator settings.
    OutboxProperties.Tracing.Sdk - Record Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring
    Spring-aware opentelemetry-sdk-extension-autoconfigure bridge.
    OutboxTransientException - Exception Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Signals a transient failure of the underlying store: connectivity loss, deadlock, serialization conflict, lock timeout, or any condition the database itself classifies as retryable.
    OutboxTransientException(String) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxTransientException
    Creates a new OutboxTransientException with the given message.
    OutboxTransientException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxTransientException
    Creates a new OutboxTransientException with the given message and cause.
    OutboxValidationException - Exception Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox
    Signals that an OutboxEvent cannot be constructed because the caller supplied an invalid field value: a null required component, a blank string where a non-blank value is required, or a null key/value inside the headers map.
    OutboxValidationException(String) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxValidationException
    Creates a new OutboxValidationException with the given message.
    OutboxValidationException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxValidationException
    Creates a new OutboxValidationException with the given message and cause.

    P

    payload() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent
    Returns a defensive copy of payload.
    payload(byte[]) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent.Builder
    Sets the opaque payload bytes.
    payloadSize() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.OutboxEvent
    Returns the size in bytes of the payload, without cloning the underlying array.
    prepareInsert(Connection, TableRef) - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxDialect
    Prepares an OutboxInsert handle for the given table.
    priority() - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxDialectProvider
    Priority used to break ties when multiple providers report supports for the same database.
    publish(OutboxEvent) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox
     
    publish(OutboxEvent) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer.MeteredOutbox
     
    publish(OutboxEvent) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel.TracedOutbox
     
    publish(OutboxEvent) - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.Outbox
    Persists the given event to the outbox table.
    publishAll(Iterable) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox
     
    publishAll(Iterable) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.micrometer.MeteredOutbox
     
    publishAll(Iterable) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel.TracedOutbox
     
    publishAll(Iterable) - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.Outbox
    Persists every event in events to the outbox table, atomically with respect to the caller's transaction.

    Q

    qualified() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.TableRef
    Returns the qualified table reference: schema.tableName or just tableName.

    S

    schema() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.TableRef
    Returns the value of the schema record component.

    Returns the value of the schema record component.
    schema(String) - Method in class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.JdbcOutbox.Builder
    Sets the schema qualifier for the outbox table.

    Returns the value of the setAsGlobal record component.
    supports(DatabaseMetaData) - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxDialectProvider
    Returns true if this provider's dialect can handle the database described by metaData.

    T

    tableName() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.TableRef

    Returns the value of the tableName record component.

    Sets the outbox table name.
    TableRef - Record Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi
    Reference to the target outbox table.
    TableRef(String, String) - Constructor for record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.TableRef
    Canonical compact constructor: validates tableName (required) and schema (optional) against the strict identifier pattern.

    Returns the value of the tagFallback record component.

    The dialect can persist instants with their timezone offset (e.g.

    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties.Tracing.Sdk
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    toString() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties.Tracing
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    TracedOutbox - Class in io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel
    Decorator that wraps every publish and publishAll call in an OpenTelemetry span using the messaging.* semantic conventions, and injects the active trace context into the event's headers so downstream consumers (relay / CDC / broker) can create a linked CONSUMER span from the event alone.
    TracedOutbox(Outbox, OpenTelemetry) - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel.TracedOutbox
    Convenience constructor that builds a Tracer from otel pinned to the outbox-otel instrumentation scope ("io.github.lobofoltran.outbox") and to this library's published version (read from Package.getImplementationVersion(), falling back to "unknown" when the JAR is exploded on the classpath without a manifest — typically only the case in IDE / reactor builds).
    TracedOutbox(Outbox, Tracer) - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel.TracedOutbox
    Wraps delegate so every publish call emits a span on the supplied Tracer and propagates trace context via the W3C traceparent / tracestate headers.
    TracedOutbox(Outbox, Tracer, TextMapPropagator) - Constructor for class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.otel.TracedOutbox
    Wraps delegate so every publish call emits a span on the supplied Tracer and propagates trace context using the supplied TextMapPropagator.
    tracing() - Method in record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties
    Returns the value of the tracing record component.
    Tracing(boolean, OutboxProperties.Tracing.Sdk) - Constructor for record class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.spring.OutboxProperties.Tracing
    Creates an instance of a Tracing record class.
    translate(SQLException, String) - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxDialect
    Translates a JDBC failure into a typed OutboxException subtype, following a SQLState classification scheme that maps integrity violations, transient connectivity errors, data errors, and configuration errors onto the appropriate sealed subtype.

    U

    UPSERT_ON_CONFLICT - Enum constant in enum class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.DialectCapability
    The dialect implements idempotent inserts on duplicate id (e.g.

    V

    validate(OutboxEvent) - Method in interface io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.OutboxDialect
    Validates that event fits this dialect's underlying column constraints (width, byte length, character set, etc.) and throws OutboxDataException otherwise.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.DialectCapability
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class io.github.lobofoltran.outbox.jdbc.spi.DialectCapability
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
